title: Trump says U.S. ready for 'next conquest,' warns military to remain near Iran until 'real agreement' is honored
summary_full: The statement came a day after Washington and Tehran agreed to a two-week ceasefire brokered by Pakistan, which halted six weeks of fighting.
summary_public: The statement came a day after Washington and Tehran agreed to a two-week ceasefire brokered by Pakistan, which halted six weeks of fighting.
